transcript.raw_model_output: {"action": "finish", "answer": "The latest developments in fusion energy include various companies making progress towards commercialization, such as Commonwealth Fusion Systems applying to join a major power grid operator and announcing peer-reviewed papers on the physics basis of its ARC power plant. Other companies like General Fusion are partnering with infrastructure companies to deploy their clean energy, while Helion Energy has raised over $1.5 billion in funding. Additionally, new initiatives have been launched, including the High Energy Density Initiative (HEDI) and a EU Task Force on Fusion Energy. The fusion industry is also seeing growth in supply chain spending, but targeted incentives are needed to boost this sector further."}

answer: The latest developments in fusion energy include various companies making progress towards commercialization, such as Commonwealth Fusion Systems applying to join a major power grid operator and announcing peer-reviewed papers on the physics basis of its ARC power plant. Other companies like General Fusion are partnering with infrastructure companies to deploy their clean energy, while Helion Energy has raised over $1.5 billion in funding. Additionally, new initiatives have been launched, including the High Energy Density Initiative (HEDI) and a EU Task Force on Fusion Energy. The fusion industry is also seeing growth in supply chain spending, but targeted incentives are needed to boost this sector further.
